title: Oxydectes dichroa
taxonomy: Oxydectes dichroa is classified in the family Melastomataceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the "melastome family." It is a diverse group of plants that are native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. The family Melastomataceae is part of the order Myrtales, which is a larger group of plants that also includes other families such as the Myrtaceae and the Onagraceae. Oxydectes dichroa, like other members of the Melastomataceae family, produces showy flowers that are often white or colored.
